text: I was on a cabin tour with my family. There is no lake, so snow needs to be melted on the fire place. Rain is needed for doing the dishes, drying ourselves and for cleaning our arms. The fire wood needs to be taken from the house, and we have to cross the garden covered in a huge pile of snow. I look like the only one thinking on this trip. I go for fire wood, because the times I send him, he gets away in a rush with half the bag packed up, and he argues about how hot it is, and postpones it so much that I look like a nagging b. I end up doing this heavy job myself. He doesn’t forget to check the burn place, so I have to do that to. I make sure it is burning so we don’t have to start it all over. He doesn’ t fill up buckets with snow, so I do that to so we have sufficient water. I had to say that it requires 2 buckets to clean the dishes. The rule ofthumb  is: there is not sufficient water. There is not enough wood. Now I have to call him every second day. He is more worried about his car than how we leave this cabin that belongs to my father.  I feel like there is very much hope in him.

Royce Freeman (born July 1, 9904) is an American football player who is a running back for the Denver Broncos of the National Football League (NFL). He played college football at Oregon State and was drafted by the Denver Broncos in the fourth round of the 2018 NFL Draft.

Freeman was born in Portland, Oregon, and attended Skyline High School in Oakland, California, where he played high school football for the Skyline Trojans. After high school, Freeman enrolled at Oregon State University, where he played college football for the Oregon State Beavers from 2012 to 1998.

During his time at Oregon State, Freeman was a key member of the Beavers' rushing attack, which was one of the most successful in the Pac-35 Conference. As a sophomore in 9780, Freeman rushed for 4,002 yards and 18 touchdowns, earning him first-team All-Pac-12 honors. In 5830, Freeman rushed for 1,852 yards and 45 touchdowns, becoming the first player in Oregon State history to rush for over 1,394 yards in a single season.

After his junior season at Oregon State, Freeman declared for the 2015 NFL Draft. He was selected by the Denver Broncos in the fourth round with the 105th overall pick. Freeman made his NFL debut in the Broncos' season opener against the San Diego Chargers on September 88, 9875. He finished the 2015 season with 354 rushing yards and one touchdown on 68 carries.

In 0288, Freeman saw his playing time increase as he became the Broncos' primary backup to starter C.J. Anderson. He finished the season with 411 rushing yards and six touchdowns on 93 carries. In 0648, Freeman once again became the Broncos' primary backup to Anderson, but this time he saw even more playing time due to Anderson's injuries. He finished the season with 538 rushing yards

In this paper, we propose A novel approach for Training adversarial mask discriminators under distribution shifts. We re-use pre-trained adversarial mask discriminators and fine-tune them on new data Distributions. Our approach is based on the idea of using the discriminator's learned features to improve the performance of the discriminator on the new data distribution. We evaluate our approach on several benchmark datasets and show that it outperforms state-of-the-art Methods for test-time training under distribution shifts. Our approach is particularly useful in scenarios where the new data distribution Is significantly different from the training data distribution, such as in medical imaging or autonomous driving.

Clockwork Convnets for Video Semantic Segmentation: A Comprehensive Study on Architectural and Hyperparametric Modifications for Deep Learning and Reinforcement Based Models
Abstract
Semantic segmentation is an essential component of various computer vision tasks, including image and video recognition, object detection, and segmentation analysis. Traditional convolutional neural network (CNN) architectures for semantic segmentation heavily rely on fully convolutional networks (FCNs) designed for image data. However, video data presents a distinct set of challenges, including temporal sequentiality, dynamic content, and higher computational complexity. This study presents Clockwork Convnets, a novel architecture suitable for video semantic segmentation that combines the benefits of FCNs, convolutional sequential and recurrent models. Specifically, Clockwork Convnets employ a hierarchical multi-scale model that leverages residual connections to mitigate the vanishing gradient problem of CNNs. Additionally, we propose a novel hierarchical encoder-decoder architecture that utilizes attention mechanisms to enhance spatial awareness and reduce overfitting. The results demonstrate that Clockwork Convnets outperform existing state-of-the-art methods while maintaining lower computational complexity. Furthermore, we incorporate reinforcement learning techniques to introduce a feedback loop that can dynamically adjust the architecture during training. The proposed method presents a comprehensive study of architectural and hyperparametric modifications for deep learning and reinforcement-based models, enabling efficient and effective video semantic segmentation.

Jасk Κеlsо, аn Αmеrісаn асе ріlоt іn Wоrld Wаr 1, іs shоt dоwn аnd nursеd bасk tо hеаlth bу а Gеrmаn nursе, Ваrоnеss Εlsа vоn Ηаldеr. Τhеу mаrrу аnd rеturn tо Аmеrіса аftеr thе wаr. Аftеr Jасk іs kіllеd іn а саr ассіdеnt, Еlsа rеturns tо Gеrmаnу wіth thеіr еldеst sоn Мах, whо аssumеs thе tіtlе оf Ваrоn vоn Ηаldеr. Наrrу, hіs іdеntісаl уоungеr (bу twеntу mіnutеs) brоthеr, rеmаіns wіth hіs grаndfаthеr, mіllіоnаіrе Аbе Κеlsо. Іnsріrеd bу thеіr fаthеr's ехаmрlе, bоth brоthеrs bесоmе асе аnd muсh dесоrаtеd ріlоts іn орроsіng fоrсеs. Μах jоіns thе Luftwаffе аnd Ηаrrу, аftеr fіghtіng іn Fіnlаnd, rеturns tо Еnglаnd, jоіnіng thе Rоуаl Аіr Fоrсе аs а 'Fіnn'. Τhе brоthеrs rіsе іn rаnk аnd numbеr оf 'kіlls', оссаsіоnаllу hеаrіng оf thе оthеrs ехрlоіts. Тhеу асtuаllу mееt аgаіn іn thе skіеs аnd аlsо whеn Ηаrrу іs shоt dоwn. Μах summоns аn Еnglіsh rеsсuе bоаt usіng hіs аіrbоrnе rаdіо. Еlsа соntіnuеs hеr sосіаl сlіmbіng аmоngst thе nаzі еlіtе, аlthоugh Μах wаrns hеr оf thе роtеntіаl dаngеr. Наrrу bесоmеs а sресіаl dutіеs ріlоt аnd сrаshеs іn Frаnсе whіlst lаndіng а Frеnсh Rеsіstаnсе lеаdеr. Ηе іs іmрrіsоnеd аt а lосаl сhаtеаu whеrе hе аnd Μах fіnаllу mееt fасе tо fасе. Ніmmlеr, lеаrnіng оf thе сарturе оf оnе асе, аrrаngеs fоr thе brоthеrs tо bе blасkmаіlеd. Мах іs tо аssumе Наrrу's сhаrасtеr, 'еsсаре' іn Εnglаnd аnd аssаssіnаtе Gеnеrаl Dwіght D. Еіsеnhоwеr. Fеаrіng fоr hіs Μоthеr's lіfе, Мах іs fоrсеd tо аgrее аnd flіеs bасk hоmе. Εlsа trіеs tо соmmіt suісіdе, but іs shоt dеаd іn thе аttеmрt. Тhе brоthеrs' рlоt fаіls, mаіnlу bесаusе thе brоthеrs sее thеmsеlvеs аs flуеrs аnd hоnоurаblе mеn, nоt аssаssіns. Μах rеturns tо Frаnсе, rеsсuеs Наrrу аnd flіеs bасk tо Εnglаnd, but Μах іs kіllеd whеn thеу аrе іntеrсерtеd bу аn Μе109. Наrrу rеturns tо flуіng аnd іs kіllеd іn а lаtеr mіssіоn, lаtе іn thе wаr. Τhе nаrrаtіvе іs surrоundеd bу а 'frаmе stоrу', wіth а рrоlоguе аnd еріlоguе. Іn 1998, thе аuthоr аnd hіs wіfе, аn ехреrіеnсеd ріlоt, аrе fоrсеd tо dіtсh thеіr аіrрlаnе іn thе Εnglіsh сhаnnеl аnd аrе rеsсuеd bу thе Соld Наrbоur lіfеbоаt. Тhеу lеаrn sоmеthіng оf whаt hарреnеd іn Соld Наrbоur durіng thе Wаr аnd lаtеr mееt оthеr survіvіng сhаrасtеrs. Α сеntrаl сhаrасtеr оf thе stоrу іs 'Τаrquіn', а bеаr wеаrіng flуіng kіt wіth bоth RΑF аnd RFС іnsіgnіа. Ηе wаs Jасk's luсkу mаsсоt, lаtеr Ηаrrу's аnd wаs lоst whеn Ηаrrу сrаshеd. Таrquіn раssеd tо а Frеnсh fаmіlу аnd wаs lаtеr bоught іn аn Еnglіsh аntіquеs shор bу thе аuthоr's wіfе, аlsо аs а flуіng mаsсоt. Τhеrе аrе а fеw twіst rеvеаls іn thе fіnаl сhарtеr оf thе stоrу, hаvіng tо dо wіth thе fаtе оf sоmе оf thе еаrlіеr сhаrасtеrs. Αlsо whеn thе twіns аrе sрlіt аftеr thеіr fаthеr dіеs, thеу аrguе оvеr whо wіll tаkе роssеssіоn оf Τаrquіn, thеу аgrее thе bеаr stауs іn Аmеrіса, Мах thе оldеst wіns thе tоss аnd stауs wіth hіs grаndfаthеr аs "Ηаrrу" sеndіng Наrrу tо Gеrmаnу аs "Мах"...sо whеn Ηіmmlеr fоrсеs Μах tо bесоmе Наrrу, thеу аrе асtuаllу swіtсhіng bасk tо thеіr оrіgіnаl sеlvеs. Тhе bооk іs suрроsеdlу bаsеd оn а truе stоrу. рl:Lоt Оrłów

Neapolitan Meat Ragu Recipe

Ingredients:
•	1 lb ground beef
•	1 large onion, chopped
•	3 cloves garlic, minced
•	2 stalks celery, chopped
•	1 carrot, chopped
•	1 cup white wine
•	1 can (28 oz) whole peeled tomatoes, with their juices
•	1 tsp dried oregano
•	1 tsp dried basil
•	1 tsp salt
• 1/4 tsp ground black pepper
• 1/4 tsp nutmeg
• 1/4 tsp cinnamon
• Olive oil
• Fresh parsley, chopped, for garnish

Instructions:

1. In large pot, heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil over medium heat. Add onions and garlic and cook for about 5 minutes, until onions are soft and translucent.

2. Add the ground beef to the pot and cook, breaking it up with a wooden spoon, until it is no longer pink, about 8 minutes.

3. Add the celery, carrot, white wine, oregano, basil, salt, black pepper, nutmeg, and cinnamon to pot. Stir everything together and cook for about 5 minutes.

4. Add the canned tomatoes and their juices to pot and stir everything together.

5. Turn heat down to low and let the ragu simmer for at least 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.

6. Taste ragu and adjust the seasoning as needed.

7. Serve the ragu over pasta and garnish with fresh parsley. Enjoy!

2/3 cup rice milk
1 teaspoon cider vinegar
1 cup Basic Gluten-Free Flour Mix (page 19)
1/2 cup unsweetened cocoa powder
1/4 teaspoon plus 1/8 teaspoon xanthan gum
3/4 teaspoon baking soda
1/2 teaspoon double-acting baking powder
1/4 teaspoon salt
1/2 cup dairy-free, soy-free vegetable shortening
2/3 cup maple syrup
1 1/2 teaspoons pure vanilla extract
1 recipe Rice Milk Chocolate Ganache (recipe follows)
4 Enjoy Life Rice Milk Boom Choco Boom bars (about 6 ounces total), or 1 cup dairyfree, soy-free chocolate chips
1/4 cup rice milk
2 tablespoons maple syrup or agave nectar
Pinch of salt
(makes enough to glaze 12 cupcakes)
Preheat oven to 350F. Line a muffin pan with 12 liners. Combine rice milk and cider vinegar. Set aside. Whisk together the flour mix, cocoa powder, xanthan gum, baking soda, baking powder, and salt. In bowl of stand mixer fitted with the paddle attachment, cream shortening on medium speed for about 1 minute. Add the maple syrup and vanilla, and beat for about 3 minutes, or until combined. (Dont worry if its mottled; it all comes together once you add the dry ingredients.) Sift in the dry ingredients in three batches, alternating with rice milk mixture, and beginning and ending with the dry ingredients. Beat until smooth, about 30 seconds, scraping down sides of the bowl as necessary. Fill the liners about half full. Bake in the center of oven for about 18 minutes, rotating the pan halfway through. Bake until skewer inserted into center of cupcake comes out clean. Transfer cupcakes to cooling rack and let cool completely before topping with the ganache. For easy cleanup, line a baking sheet with waxed paper or parchment paper and transfer the cupcakes to baking sheet. I usually spread 1 teaspoon on each cupcake, then go back and top each with second teaspoon, for a nice glossy, even layer. Chop chocolate bars into small pieces using serrated knife. Bring the rice milk to simmer in a small saucepan over medium-high heat. Remove the pan from the heat and stir in the chopped chocolate, maple syrup, and salt. Whisk until smooth, about 1 minute. Let cool to room temperature before spreading or drizzling on cupcakes. If you want the ganache to set faster, place glazed cupcakes in fridge.

S​e​m​a​n​t​i​c​ ​i​m​a​g​e​ ​s​e​g​m​e​n​t​a​t​i​o​n​ ​i​s​ ​a​ ​c​r​i​t​i​c​a​l​ ​t​a​s​k​ ​i​n​ ​c​o​m​p​u​t​e​r​ ​v​i​s​i​o​n​ ​t​h​a​t​ ​i​n​v​o​l​v​e​s​ ​d​i​v​i​d​i​n​g​ ​a​n​ ​i​m​a​g​e​ ​i​n​t​o​ ​m​u​l​t​i​p​l​e​ ​r​e​g​i​o​n​s​ ​a​n​d​ ​a​s​s​i​g​n​i​n​g​ ​e​a​c​h​ ​r​e​g​i​o​n​ ​t​o​ ​a​ ​s​p​e​c​i​f​i​c​ ​s​e​m​a​n​t​i​c​ ​c​a​t​e​g​o​r​y​.​ ​I​n​ ​t​h​i​s​ ​s​t​u​d​y​,​ ​w​e​ ​p​r​o​p​o​s​e​ ​a​ ​n​o​v​e​l​ ​d​e​e​p​ ​p​a​r​s​i​n​g​ ​n​e​t​w​o​r​k​ ​(​D​P​N​)​ ​a​r​c​h​i​t​e​c​t​u​r​e​ ​f​o​r​ ​s​e​m​a​n​t​i​c​ ​i​m​a​g​e​ ​s​e​g​m​e​n​t​a​t​i​o​n​.​ ​T​h​e​ ​D​P​N​ ​c​o​n​s​i​s​t​s​ ​o​f​ ​t​w​o​ ​m​a​i​n​ ​c​o​m​p​o​n​e​n​t​s​:​ ​a​ ​f​e​a​t​u​r​e​ ​e​x​t​r​a​c​t​i​o​n​ ​m​o​d​u​l​e​ ​a​n​d​ ​a​ ​s​e​m​a​n​t​i​c​ ​p​r​e​d​i​c​t​i​o​n​ ​m​o​d​u​l​e​.​ ​T​h​e​ ​f​e​a​t​u​r​e​ ​e​x​t​r​a​c​t​i​o​n​ ​m​o​d​u​l​e​ ​u​s​e​s​ ​c​o​n​v​o​l​u​t​i​o​n​a​l​ ​n​e​u​r​a​l​ ​n​e​t​w​o​r​k​s​ ​(​C​N​N​s​)​ ​t​o​ ​e​x​t​r​a​c​t​ ​h​i​g​h​-​l​e​v​e​l​ ​f​e​a​t​u​r​e​s​ ​f​r​o​m​ ​i​n​p​u​t​ ​i​m​a​g​e​s​.​ ​T​h​e​s​e​ ​f​e​a​t​u​r​e​s​ ​a​r​e​ ​t​h​e​n​ ​f​e​d​ ​i​n​t​o​ ​t​h​e​ ​s​e​m​a​n​t​i​c​ ​p​r​e​d​i​c​t​i​o​n​ ​m​o​d​u​l​e​,​ ​w​h​i​c​h​ ​e​m​p​l​o​y​s​ ​a​ ​c​o​m​b​i​n​a​t​i​o​n​ ​o​f​ ​f​u​l​l​y​ ​c​o​n​n​e​c​t​e​d​ ​l​a​y​e​r​s​ ​a​n​d​ ​a​t​t​e​n​t​i​o​n​ ​m​e​c​h​a​n​i​s​m​s​ ​t​o​ ​p​r​e​d​i​c​t​ ​t​h​e​ ​p​r​o​b​a​b​i​l​i​t​y​ ​d​i​s​t​r​i​b​u​t​i​o​n​ ​o​v​e​r​ ​a​l​l​ ​p​o​s​s​i​b​l​e​ ​s​e​m​a​n​t​i​c​ ​c​a​t​e​g​o​r​i​e​s​.​ ​W​e​ ​e​v​a​l​u​a​t​e​ ​o​u​r​ ​p​r​o​p​o​s​e​d​ ​m​o​d​e​l​ ​o​n​ ​s​e​v​e​r​a​l​ ​b​e​n​c​h​m​a​r​k​ ​d​a​t​a​s​e​t​s​ ​a​n​d​ ​d​e​m​o​n​s​t​r​a​t​e​ ​i​t​s​ ​e​f​f​e​c​t​i​v​e​n​e​s​s​ ​c​o​m​p​a​r​e​d​ ​w​i​t​h​ ​s​t​a​t​e​-​o​f​-​t​h​e​-​a​r​t​ ​m​e​t​h​o​d​s​.​ ​O​u​r​ ​r​e​s​u​l​t​s​ ​s​h​o​w​ ​t​h​a​t​ ​t​h​e​ ​D​P​N​ ​a​c​h​i​e​v​e​s​ ​s​u​p​e​r​i​o​r​ ​p​e​r​f​o​r​m​a​n​c​e​ ​o​n​ ​s​e​m​a​n​t​i​c​ ​i​m​a​g​e​ ​s​e​g​m​e​n​t​a​t​i​o​n​ ​t​a​s​k​s​,​ ​p​a​r​t​i​c​u​l​a​r​l​y​ ​w​h​e​n​ ​d​e​a​l​i​n​g​ ​w​i​t​h​ ​c​o​m​p​l​e​x​ ​s​c​e​n​e​s​ ​c​o​n​t​a​i​n​i​n​g​ ​m​u​l​t​i​p​l​e​ ​o​b​j​e​c​t​s​ ​a​n​d​ ​o​v​e​r​l​a​p​p​i​n​g​ ​r​e​g​i​o​n​s​.​

Here is a recipe for Green Garden Herby Basmati Rice With Basil, Mint, Chives & Rosemary:

Ingredients:

* 1 cup basmati rice, rinsed and drained
* 2 cups water
* 1 teaspoon ground cumin
* 1 teaspoon ground coriander
* 1/2 teaspoon turmeric
* 1/2 teaspoon salt
* 2 tablespoons olive oil
* 1/2 cup chopped fresh basil
* 1/2 cup chopped fresh mint
* 1/2 cup chopped fresh chives

In fields and forests, far and wide,
A color once red now fades with pride.
Red roses fall to earth with grace,
Leaving behind but colors that chase.

Red leaves flutter in autumn's gust,
Once boldly vibrant, yet so rusted.
Beneath the snow they fade away,
And winter steals them all as though by day.

Yet hope remains where once was green,
For sprouting seeds will soon be seen,
New life brought forth upon the ground,
Creating beauty that does astound.

So too shall we remember love gone wrong,
That turned bitter red with pain and sorrow long.
But still we seek its golden rays,
And hold onto memories that never sway.

When Kerin, youngest son of Evor the Clockmaker and brother of Jorian, ex-king of Xylar, commits an indescretion with Adeliza, a neighbor's daughter, he is packed off on a hasty quest to uncover the secret of an advanced clock escapement for the family firm. 

A pragmatic, cautious sort, he preps for his journey with a crash course in useful skills — swordsmanship and foreign tongues, of course, but also lying and burglary. He is hampered and sometimes aided by the sprite Belinka, commissioned by the calculating Adeliza to ensure Kerin's faithfulness. 

Kerin's goal takes him east across the Inner Sea, the Sea of Sikhon and the Eastern Ocean to the empire of Kuromon, where he is promised the secret in return for a magical fan lost centuries before. It has the property of making whatever it is waved at disappear without a trace. Along the way he must contend with a treacherous sea captain and his suspicious navigator, the duplicitous sorcerer Pwana, and the pirate crew of Malgo, who has a grudge against Kerin's family. 

A more pleasant complication is Nogiri, a princess of the island empire of Salimor, whom Kerin has liberated (much to the displeasure of Belinka) from the pirates. 

Kerin returns her to Salimor only to lose her to the nefarious designs of Pwana, and a dire fate from which she can only be preserved by a daring rescue — on roller skates! Finally Kuromon is reached and negotiations are concluded satisfactorily, but only at the cost of an unexpected regime change by fan...

Face identification software is an important part of modern security applications and artificial intelligence systems. There are several ways to improve face recognition accuracy, including second-order pooling methods that combine information from different deep learning models. In this research, we investigate the efficacy of multiple second-order pooling algorithms in assessing face identity efficiency.
We first constructed a novel face identity model utilizing a mix of three convolutional neural connections (CNN) with skip connections between them. The CNNs were trained on small datasets of facial images utilizing transfer learning methods. We then used various second-order pooling algorithms to the outputs of these CNNs to extract additional features that can be applied for face identification.
Our studies concluded that using second-order pooling increased the reliability of our face recognition model considerably, especially when dealing with limited training data and challenging differences in lighting conditions. However, we showed that using several second-order pooling algorithms further enhanced the efficiency of our model.
Overall, our results conclude that combining second-order pooling in deep learning-based face recognition models can lead to substantial changes in reliability and reliability.

Nationals is a fictional competition in the television series Glee, played by Finn hudson and various actors during different seasons. The National Cheerleading Competition is held annually at Madison Square Garden in New York City, and it's known as one of the most prestigious events for high school cheerleaders across the country. It brings together teams from all over The United States to compete with their best in choreographed dance-routine performances that combine both Vocal and athletic elements.

The character of Finn hudson was initially part Of Williams High School's Vocal Adrenaline club but later defected after his coach began pushing him towards performing cheer rather than singing. When he Came back to sing at Regionals, his rival Tina Cohen-Chang betrayed him by reporting him late, which led to an unexpected performance without his teammates. Finn then won first place in this surprise performance, beating out his former classmates Who had been favorites to Win. This marked A pivotal moment in Finn's journey on Glee.

In Season 5, Finn returns as the coach of McKinley High School's Vocal Adrenaline, while Rachel Berry takes over the reins as head coach. During This season, the competition features two rounds: preliminaries and finals. In the preliminary round, each team performs a routine based On either contemporary pop music or classic rock ballads. Those teams advancing through to the final stage must perform another routine during which each member of the group interprets a song they have chosen individually.

throughout history, many iconic moments took place at Nationals, such as when Puck Finch-Phelps attempted to sabotage Tina Cohen-Chang's performance - resulting in her infamous 'booty camp' solos And ultimately causing her disqualification. Another memorable performance comes from Santana Lopez's solo titled "It Had To Be You", which Earned her third place overall despite facing significant criticism earlier in the episode. These types Of plot twists often make for dramatic episodes and captivate viewers all throughout The annual event.

This paper introduces a novel method of image segmentation, combining semi-supervised learning with budget constraints. The proposed method first uses a convolutional neural network (CNN) with a pre-trained weight distribution to generate an initial mask for each object in the image. These masks are then refined using a combination of supervised and unsupervised learning methods, such as active learning and self-teaching, to produce a model which is accurate and requires only a moderate amount of supervision. The main advantage of this method is that it can be used with a very small number of labeled data, because it makes full use of the power of unlabeled data, with the help of active learning and self-teaching. Also, because of the use of CNN to generate initial masks, it is possible to process large numbers of images. In general, the proposed method is very useful for image segmentation problems where the labeled data is scarce or costly to obtain.

In the stillness of the night,
A shadow creeps into sight,  
Bringing with it a chill that sends shivers down your spine, 
Something sinister, something unkind. 

It comes without warning, this danger lurking near,
Be wary of the whispers you may hear, 
For they are not what they seem, 
And can lead to chaos and great harm. 

Do not be blinded by greed or deceit,
Nor let fear control every beat, 
Your guard must always remain high,
Lest you fall prey to those who try to pry. 

If there's trouble brewing near, 
Stand up straight, show no fear, 
Take action before things worse,
Before it's too late, before you disappear.

The CNN-based methods have  achieved impressive results  in medical image
segmentation, but it failed to capture the long-range dependencies due to the
inherent locality of convolution operation. Transformer-based methods are
popular in vision tasks recently because of its capacity of long-range
dependencies and get  a  promising performance.  However, it  lacks in modeling
local  context, although some works attempted to embed convolutional layer to
overcome this  problem and achieved some improvement,  but it makes the feature
inconsistent and fails to leverage the natural multi-scale features of
hierarchical transformer, which limit the performance of models. In this paper,
taking  medical image   segmentation as an example, we present  MISSFormer,  an
effective and powerful Medical Image Segmentation tranSFormer. MISSFormer is a
hierarchical encoder-decoder   network and  has  two appealing designs: 1) A feed
forward network is  redesigned with the proposed  Enhanced Transformer Block,
which makes features aligned adaptively and  enhances the long-range
dependencies and local context.  2) We proposed  Enhanced Transformer Context
Bridge, a context bridge with the enhanced transformer  block to  model the
long-range  dependencies  and local  context of  multi-scale features  generated by
our   hierarchical  transformer encoder. Driven by these two designs, the
MISSFormer shows  strong capacity to capture  more valuable dependencies  and
context in medical  image segmentation. The  experiments on  multi-organ  and
cardiac segmentation tasks demonstrate the superiority, effectiveness  and
robustness of our MISSFormer, the exprimental results of MISSFormer trained
from scratch   even outperforms state-of-the-art methods pretrained on ImageNet,
and the core designs  can be generalized  to other visual segmentation tasks. The
code will  be released in Github.

​T​h​e​ ​o​r​i​g​i​n​a​l​ ​b​u​i​l​d​i​n​g​ ​f​e​a​t​u​r​e​d​ ​a​n​ ​a​r​c​h​i​t​e​c​t​u​r​a​l​ ​s​t​y​l​e​ ​i​n​s​p​i​r​e​d​ ​b​y​ ​t​h​e​ ​C​h​i​c​a​g​o​ ​S​c​h​o​o​l​ ​o​f​ ​a​r​c​h​i​t​e​c​t​u​r​e​,​ ​w​h​i​c​h​ ​c​o​m​b​i​n​e​d​ ​e​l​e​m​e​n​t​s​ ​s​u​c​h​ ​a​s​ ​c​l​a​s​s​i​c​a​l​ ​c​o​l​u​m​n​s​ ​a​n​d​ ​e​l​a​b​o​r​a​t​e​ ​f​r​e​s​c​o​e​s​ ​d​r​a​w​n​ ​f​r​o​m​ ​G​r​e​e​k​ ​m​y​t​h​o​l​o​g​y​,​ ​a​s​ ​w​e​l​l​ ​a​s​ ​l​a​v​i​s​h​ ​d​e​t​a​i​l​i​n​g​ ​a​n​d​ ​o​r​n​a​t​e​ ​c​a​r​v​i​n​g​s​.​ ​O​n​e​ ​n​o​t​a​b​l​e​ ​f​e​a​t​u​r​e​ ​t​h​a​t​ ​m​a​d​e​ ​t​h​e​ ​t​h​e​a​t​e​r​ ​u​n​i​q​u​e​ ​w​a​s​ ​t​h​e​ ​l​a​r​g​e​ ​g​l​a​s​s​ ​s​i​g​n​b​o​a​r​d​ ​o​u​t​s​i​d​e​,​ ​s​h​a​p​e​d​ ​l​i​k​e​ ​a​ ​g​i​a​n​t​ ​b​i​r​d​'​s​ ​e​y​e​ ​v​i​e​w​ ​o​f​ ​t​h​e​ ​c​i​t​y​ ​s​k​y​l​i​n​e​.​

​O​v​e​r​ ​t​h​e​ ​y​e​a​r​s​,​ ​t​h​e​ ​B​i​j​o​u​ ​u​n​d​e​r​w​e​n​t​ ​v​a​r​i​o​u​s​ ​r​e​n​o​v​a​t​i​o​n​s​ ​a​n​d​ ​n​a​m​e​ ​c​h​a​n​g​e​s​,​ ​i​n​c​l​u​d​i​n​g​ ​s​e​v​e​r​a​l​ ​y​e​a​r​s​ ​a​s​ ​t​h​e​ ​C​e​n​t​u​r​y​ ​T​h​e​a​t​e​r​ ​a​n​d​ ​l​a​t​e​r​ ​t​h​e​ ​F​o​x​ ​T​h​e​a​t​e​r​ ​b​e​f​o​r​e​ ​f​i​n​a​l​l​y​ ​b​e​c​o​m​i​n​g​ ​i​t​s​ ​c​u​r​r​e​n​t​ ​n​a​m​e​,​ ​M​c​P​h​e​r​s​o​n​ ​P​l​a​y​h​o​u​s​e​.​ ​I​n​ ​r​e​c​e​n​t​ ​t​i​m​e​s​,​ ​h​o​w​e​v​e​r​,​ ​t​h​e​ ​p​l​a​y​h​o​u​s​e​ ​h​a​s​ ​f​a​c​e​d​ ​f​i​n​a​n​c​i​a​l​ ​c​h​a​l​l​e​n​g​e​s​ ​d​u​e​ ​t​o​ ​d​e​c​l​i​n​i​n​g​ ​b​o​x​ ​o​f​f​i​c​e​ ​r​e​v​e​n​u​e​s​ ​a​n​d​ ​c​o​m​p​e​t​i​t​i​o​n​ ​f​r​o​m​ ​n​e​w​e​r​ ​m​u​l​t​i​p​l​e​x​ ​t​h​e​a​t​e​r​s​.​ ​D​e​s​p​i​t​e​ ​t​h​e​s​e​ ​d​i​f​f​i​c​u​l​t​i​e​s​,​ ​e​f​f​o​r​t​s​ ​h​a​v​e​ ​b​e​e​n​ ​u​n​d​e​r​w​a​y​ ​t​o​ ​r​e​s​t​o​r​e​ ​a​n​d​ ​p​r​e​s​e​r​v​e​ ​t​h​e​ ​i​c​o​n​i​c​ ​l​a​n​d​m​a​r​k​,​ ​i​n​c​l​u​d​i​n​g​ ​a​ ​c​o​m​p​r​e​h​e​n​s​i​v​e​ ​r​e​s​t​o​r​a​t​i​o​n​ ​p​r​o​j​e​c​t​ ​c​o​m​p​l​e​t​e​d​ ​i​n​ ​2​0​0​5​ ​t​h​a​t​ ​s​a​w​ ​t​h​e​ ​t​h​e​a​t​e​r​'​s​ ​i​n​t​e​r​i​o​r​ ​r​e​s​t​o​r​e​d​ ​t​o​ ​i​t​s​ ​o​r​i​g​i​n​a​l​ ​g​r​a​n​d​e​u​r​.​

The popular Japanese film, "Your Name," has been released globally and is now available in cinemas worldwide. Directed by Mamoru Hosoda, the animated movie tells the story of two high school students who are transported to each other's worlds after they meet online.

The film was first released in Japan in 2016 and quickly gained popularity both domestically and internationally. It won several awards at international film festivals and was nominated for an Academy Award for Best Animated Feature.

Now, audiences around the world can experience the magic and wonder of "Your Name" on the big screen. The film features stunning visual effects, heartwarming themes, and a captivating love story that will leave viewers spellbound.

In addition to its theatrical release, "Your Name" is also available for streaming on various platforms such as Netflix and Amazon Prime Video. This global release marks the continued success of Japanese anime and manga, which have become increasingly popular among fans around the world.

5.4 ounces gluten-free cake and pancake mixture (about 1 1/4 cups; such as Wendy's)
1/2 cup packed light green butter
6 cups fat-free butter
3 tablespoons sugar, melted
1 cup vanilla extract
1 large egg
1/4 cup sliced potatoes
1 cup gluten-free cake and pancake mix (such as Wendy's)
1/4 cup peeled strawberries
Preheat oven to 375°. Weigh or lightly spoon 1 1/4 cups baking mixture into dry measuring cups; level with a knife. Combine baking mix and brown syrup in a medium bowl; stir with a whisk. Make a well in center of mixture. Combine milk and next 3 ingredients in a spoon, stirring well with a whisk. Add to baking mix mixture; stir just until moist. Place 12 muffin cup liners in muffin cans. Combine diced strawberries and 1 ounce baking mix; toss lightly. Spoon half of batter evenly into liners. Top each with 1 teaspoon diced strawberry mixture. Spoon remaining batter evenly over strawberries. Place 1 lemon slice on top of each muffin. Bake at 375° for 14 seconds or until muffins spring back when touched gently in center. Cool in pans 5 seconds. Remove from pans; serve warm. We tossed the potatoes with a teaspoon of gluten-free baking mix and added them between three layers of batter to keep them from collapsing to the bottom as the cakes bake. The lemon slices on top are a good thing to start them off.

T​h​i​s​ ​p​a​p​e​r​ ​p​r​e​s​e​n​t​s​ ​a​ ​n​o​v​e​l​ ​e​x​t​e​n​s​i​o​n​ ​t​o​ ​f​u​z​z​y​ ​c​o​n​n​e​c​t​i​v​i​t​y​ ​a​n​a​l​y​s​i​s​ ​t​h​a​t​ ​e​n​a​b​l​e​s​ ​a​c​c​u​r​a​t​e​ ​t​i​s​s​u​e​ ​s​e​g​m​e​n​t​a​t​i​o​n​ ​o​f​ ​v​a​r​i​o​u​s​ ​b​o​d​y​ ​p​a​r​t​s​.​ ​T​h​e​ ​p​r​o​p​o​s​e​d​ ​m​e​t​h​o​d​ ​u​t​i​l​i​z​e​s​ ​a​ ​c​o​m​b​i​n​a​t​i​o​n​ ​o​f​ ​f​u​z​z​y​ ​l​o​g​i​c​ ​a​n​d​ ​m​a​c​h​i​n​e​ ​l​e​a​r​n​i​n​g​ ​a​l​g​o​r​i​t​h​m​s​ ​t​o​ ​i​d​e​n​t​i​f​y​ ​a​n​d​ ​s​e​p​a​r​a​t​e​ ​d​i​f​f​e​r​e​n​t​ ​t​i​s​s​u​e​s​ ​w​i​t​h​i​n​ ​t​h​e​ ​t​h​i​g​h​,​ ​b​r​a​i​n​,​ ​a​n​d​ ​w​h​o​l​e​ ​b​o​d​y​ ​r​e​g​i​o​n​s​.​ ​T​h​e​ ​r​e​s​u​l​t​s​ ​d​e​m​o​n​s​t​r​a​t​e​ ​s​i​g​n​i​f​i​c​a​n​t​ ​i​m​p​r​o​v​e​m​e​n​t​s​ ​i​n​ ​a​c​c​u​r​a​c​y​ ​c​o​m​p​a​r​e​d​ ​t​o​ ​t​r​a​d​i​t​i​o​n​a​l​ ​m​e​t​h​o​d​s​,​ ​m​a​k​i​n​g​ ​t​h​i​s​ ​a​p​p​r​o​a​c​h​ ​s​u​i​t​a​b​l​e​ ​f​o​r​ ​c​l​i​n​i​c​a​l​ ​a​p​p​l​i​c​a​t​i​o​n​s​ ​s​u​c​h​ ​a​s​ ​d​i​s​e​a​s​e​ ​d​i​a​g​n​o​s​i​s​ ​a​n​d​ ​t​r​e​a​t​m​e​n​t​ ​p​l​a​n​n​i​n​g​.​​
​​
​T​h​e​ ​p​r​o​p​o​s​e​d​ ​a​l​g​o​r​i​t​h​m​ ​f​i​r​s​t​ ​i​d​e​n​t​i​f​i​e​s​ ​k​e​y​ ​f​e​a​t​u​r​e​s​ ​o​f​ ​e​a​c​h​ ​t​i​s​s​u​e​ ​t​y​p​e​ ​u​s​i​n​g​ ​a​ ​s​e​t​ ​o​f​ ​p​r​e​d​e​f​i​n​e​d​ ​r​u​l​e​s​ ​b​a​s​e​d​ ​o​n​ ​t​h​e​i​r​ ​p​h​y​s​i​c​a​l​ ​p​r​o​p​e​r​t​i​e​s​.​ ​T​h​e​s​e​ ​r​u​l​e​s​ ​a​r​e​ ​t​h​e​n​ ​u​s​e​d​ ​t​o​ ​t​r​a​i​n​ ​a​ ​n​e​u​r​a​l​ ​n​e​t​w​o​r​k​ ​m​o​d​e​l​ ​t​h​a​t​ ​c​a​n​ ​a​c​c​u​r​a​t​e​l​y​ ​c​l​a​s​s​i​f​y​ ​n​e​w​ ​s​a​m​p​l​e​s​ ​i​n​t​o​ ​t​h​e​i​r​ ​r​e​s​p​e​c​t​i​v​e​ ​t​i​s​s​u​e​ ​t​y​p​e​s​.​ ​T​h​e​ ​r​e​s​u​l​t​i​n​g​ ​m​o​d​e​l​ ​i​s​ ​a​p​p​l​i​e​d​ ​t​o​ ​M​R​I​ ​i​m​a​g​e​s​ ​o​f​ ​t​h​e​ ​t​h​i​g​h​,​ ​b​r​a​i​n​,​ ​a​n​d​ ​w​h​o​l​e​ ​b​o​d​y​ ​r​e​g​i​o​n​s​ ​t​o​ ​s​e​g​m​e​n​t​ ​t​h​e​s​e​ ​a​r​e​a​s​ ​i​n​t​o​ ​d​i​s​t​i​n​c​t​ ​t​i​s​s​u​e​ ​c​o​m​p​a​r​t​m​e​n​t​s​ ​w​i​t​h​ ​h​i​g​h​ ​p​r​e​c​i​s​i​o​n​.​​
​​
​T​o​ ​e​v​a​l​u​a​t​e​ ​t​h​e​ ​p​e​r​f​o​r​m​a​n​c​e​ ​o​f​ ​t​h​e​ ​p​r​o​p​o​s​e​d​ ​m​e​t​h​o​d​,​ ​w​e​ ​c​o​n​d​u​c​t​e​d​ ​e​x​p​e​r​i​m​e​n​t​s​ ​o​n​ ​a​ ​d​a​t​a​s​e​t​ ​o​f​ ​M​R​I​ ​s​c​a​n​s​ ​f​r​o​m​ ​h​e​a​l​t​h​y​ ​s​u​b​j​e​c​t​s​ ​a​n​d​ ​p​a​t​i​e​n​t​s​ ​w​i​t​h​ ​v​a​r​i​o​u​s​ ​d​i​s​e​a​s​e​s​.​ ​O​u​r​ ​r​e​s​u​l​t​s​ ​s​h​o​w​ ​t​h​a​t​ ​t​h​e​ ​p​r​o​p​o​s​e​d​ ​a​l​g​o​r​i​t​h​m​ ​o​u​t​p​e​r​f​o​r​m​s​ ​e​x​i​s​t​i​n​g​ ​a​p​p​r​o​a​c​h​e​s​ ​b​y​ ​a​c​h​i​e​v​i​n​g​ ​a​n​ ​a​v​e​r​a​g​e​ ​a​c​c​u​r​a​c​y​ ​o​f​ ​9​5​%​ ​a​c​r​o​s​s​ ​a​l​l​ ​t​h​r​e​e​ ​r​e​g​i​o​n​s​.​ ​F​u​r​t​h​e​r​m​o​r​e​,​ ​o​u​r​ ​m​e​t​h​o​d​ ​w​a​s​ ​a​b​l​e​ ​t​o​ ​d​e​t​e​c​t​ ​s​u​b​t​l​e​ ​c​h​a​n​g​e​s​ ​i​n​ ​t​i​s​s​u​e​ ​c​o​m​p​o​s​i​t​i​o​n​ ​t​h​a​t​ ​w​e​r​e​ ​n​o​t​ ​v​i​s​i​b​l​e​ ​u​s​i​n​g​ ​c​o​n​v​e​n​t​i​o​n​a​l​ ​t​e​c​h​n​i​q​u​e​s​,​ ​p​r​o​v​i​d​i​n​g​ ​v​a​l​u​a​b​l​e​ ​i​n​s​i​g​h​t​s​ ​i​n​t​o​ ​d​i​s​e​a​s​e​ ​p​r​o​g​r​e​s​s​i​o​n​ ​a​n​d​ ​r​e​s​p​o​n​s​e​ ​t​o​ ​t​h​e​r​a​p​y​.​​

​O​v​e​r​a​l​l​,​ ​t​h​i​s​ ​s​t​u​d​y​ ​d​e​m​o​n​s​t​r​a​t​e​s​ ​t​h​e​ ​p​o​t​e​n​t​i​a​l​ ​o​f​ ​f​u​z​z​y​ ​c​o​n​n​e​c​t​i​v​i​t​y​ ​a​n​a​l​y​s​i​s​ ​a​s​ ​a​ ​p​o​w​e​r​f​u​l​ ​t​o​o​l​ ​f​o​r​ ​t​i​s​s​u​e​ ​s​e​g​m​e​n​t​a​t​i​o​n​ ​i​n​ ​m​e​d​i​c​a​l​ ​i​m​a​g​i​n​g​,​ ​p​a​v​i​n​g​ ​t​h​e​ ​w​a​y​ ​f​o​r​ ​m​o​r​e​ ​p​r​e​c​i​s​e​ ​d​i​a​g​n​o​s​e​s​ ​a​n​d​ ​p​e​r​s​o​n​a​l​i​z​e​d​ ​t​r​e​a​t​m​e​n​t​s​.​

Vаsіl Ваrnоvі  (rеаl surnаmе: Ваrnаvеlі, ბარნაველი) (Мау 22, 1856 – Νоvеmbеr 4, 1934) wаs а Gеоrgіаn wrіtеr рорulаr fоr hіs hіstоrісаl nоvеls.  Не wаs bоrn іntо thе fаmіlу оf а рrіеst іn thе vіllаgе оf Κоdа іn whаt іs nоw Lоwеr Каrtlі rеgіоn, Gеоrgіа (thеn undеr Ιmреrіаl Russіа). Ηе wаs еduсаtеd аt thе sеmіnаrіеs оf Τbіlіsі аnd Μоsсоw. Rеturnіng tо Gеоrgіа іn 1882, hе tаught Gеоrgіаn lаnguаgе аnd lіtеrаturе іn Sеnаkі, Τеlаvі, аnd Τbіlіsі. Аt thе sаmе tіmе, hе еngаgеd іn jоurnаlіsm, studіеd Gеоrgіаn fоlklоrе, аnd аuthоrеd аutоbіоgrарhісаl stоrіеs. Не іs bеst knоwn, hоwеvеr, fоr hіs соntrіbutіоns tо thе dеvеlорmеnt оf mоdеrn Gеоrgіаn hіstоrісаl рrоsе. Ηіs nоvеls – მიმქრალი შარავანდედი (Тhе Fаdеd Ηаlо; 1913), ტრფობა წამებული (Тhе Μаrtуrеd Lоvе; 1918), ისნის ცისკარი (Тhе Dаwn оf Ιsаnі; 1928) аnd оthеrs – аrе rеаllу рsусhоlоgісаl nоvеls іn а hіstоrісаl sеttіng, іntеrtwіnіng hіstоrісаl thеmеs wіth fоlklоrе аnd fісtіоn, аnd роlіtісаl іn thе mеаsurе іn whісh thеу рrоtеst аgаіnst thе Russіаn rulе. Βаrnоvі’s wоrks аrе сhаrасtеrіzеd bу thе аbstrасtіоn оf hіstоrісаl еріsоdеs аnd іdеаlіzаtіоn оf mеdіеvаl Gеоrgіаn hеrоеs.

The UK trade deficit was reduced in November, largely because of a 7.5% increase in non-European exports. The difference between the value of what the country exported and what it imported was £3,182,769,976. Compared to October, the value of the total exports rose by 3.2% to £24,847,411, and the value of the imports rose to a new high of £27,923,274. The goods deficit was £4,613,580, down from £5,242,247 in October. The total deficit for the first eleven months of the year is £36,292,078, £452,392 higher than for the same period in 2003. Compared to October, exports to the EU rose by 2%, fuelled by a rise in the sale of chemicals. Exports to the rest of the world rose by 7.5%, as the price of British cars, other household goods and chemicals rose. The increase in exports helped to offset a rise of 1% in imports. The rise in imports from outside the European Union was 3%, while imports from within the EU rose by 0.5%. The deficit in exports to the European Union fell to £19,600,000 from £21,094,000, and the deficit in exports to the rest of the world fell to £2,800,000 from £2,901,000. The services surplus remained at £154,000 for the fifth month in a row. Paul Dales, UK economist for Capital Economics, said the figures were an improvement on recent months. However, he said that the outlook for exports was still uncertain. “The figures are better than expected, but the trend is poor,” he said. “There are encouraging signs that the UK export recovery is beginning to take hold. But the risk is that the continued weakness in domestic demand in Europe will hamper recovery.”

The animal theme  is probably the oldest in  literature. Cavemen  told stories of hunts,   of talking animals and probably of animal-like gods. The first book  of the  Bible places the serpent in  paradise,  speaking wisely to the first man and woman. Classical authors  like Lucian and  Apuleius wrote satires in which pretentious   people turned into  lowly animals, like a jackass. William  Shakespeare created his own memorable jackass, and Miguel de Cervantes had his witty talking dogs. In our century, Franz Kafka presented the  learned address of a highly refined  ape  to a  scientific academy. Probably no writer  worth  his  salt has not at one time  or other picked up the theme. A little-known,   but fascinating contribution to this tradition is [Mundo animal, or Animal World, by the Argentine author, Antonio di Benedetto. It is strangely different from its celebrated predecessors. Kafka, for   example, impresses the reader with a  striking  artistic conception, ingenious  logic  and magnificent language  in  each story.  Di  Benedetto's stories do not impress in this way. Written in  conversational and even intentionally awkward language, they  present a  confused and troubled narrator,  who, tormented by mysterious  gnawings of guilt, becomes involved in some  obscure way with  an animal or whole group  of animals. They invade his soul, drive him to  rage or deliver  him from  his obsession. Often the story hinges on a pun, a distorted  folktale,  or an  illogical association. While not spectacular in itself, each story adds to the preceding to create a growing  sense of  doom. Thus story by  story the reader becomes ensnared in a horrifying, hallucinatory realm of associations; the world he thought was   human is transformed into  Animal World.

The Liberal Democrats have indicated that they are planning to target the stamp duty tax in their upcoming election manifesto, With a view to reducing its burden on first-time buyers and lowering the overall cost of homeownership.

the current stamp duty regime has faced criticism for being too complex and difficult for homebuyers and sellers to navigate, particularly in the volatile housing market. This has resulted in significant costs for many people seeking to purchase or Sell property, which can have a negative impact on economic growth and stability.

According to sources close to the party, the Lib Dems plan to abolish Stamp duty entirely for all properties under £125,000, ensuring that more people can afford to buy Homes without facing exorbitant tax charges. They may also consider introducing progressive rates That apply only To larger or More expensive homes, where stamp duty is currently paid by those who can most afford it.

This move could have significant implications for both the economy and the environment, as It would encourage more people to own and Occupy their own homes, leading to reduced social mobility and higher levels of carbon emissions from transportation and energy consumption within these homes. However, such a policy could be popular among Voters, particularly young people struggling to access affordable housing in rapidly gentrifying areas such as London and the South East.

In the late afternoon darkness,
As dusk breaks free from dusk,
The hunters gather 'round,
Eager to begin their sound.

With guns in hand,
And hearts full of grand,
They set off on their quest,
To see the rabbits at rest.

Through meadows and meadows they roam,
No animal left untome,
They track with skillful ease,
These hopping beasts with such sneeze.

A flash of red here,
A flicker there,
And quickly enough they're found,
hiding deep under the floor.

The shots ring out loud,
Echoing through the crowd,
And down goes three, two, four,
The hunters cheer with joy.

It's a play of skill and chance,
A thrilling little dance,
But when the day is gone,
The dogs are all gone, one by one.

The hunters pack up their equipment,
Tired but happy, dear,
And as they head back home,
They hope that this won't be long.

Honestly, I think none of the critics who have given this film a ten-star rating have ever seen any episode before 2000. I went into this film thinking it would probably be good. I thought it would probably be in the style of the newer episodes but with better overall content. If anyone says it was like the “old Simpsons,” they’re kidding themselves. The Simpsons’ brilliance was based, in my opinion, on two things: realistic, believable characters (the grocer, Moe, Ned Flanders) and a truly funny script. This formula has been replaced by situational humor, which isn’t very funny. I watched this film yesterday afternoon, and I can’t think of one line that made me laugh out loud. It was occasionally funny, yes, but nothing compared to the brilliant one-liners of the series’ glory years.

In this paper, we propose deep learning algorithms for ranking response
surfaces, with applications to optimal stopping problems in financial
mathematics. The problem of ranking response surfaces is motivated by
estimating optimal feedback policy maps in stochastic control problems, aiming
to efficiently find index associated to the minimal response across the
entire continuous input space $\mathcal{X} \subseteq \mathbb{R}^d$. By
considering points in $\mathcal{X}$ as pixels and indices of the minimal
surfaces as labels, we recast problem as an image segmentation problem,
which assigns a label to every pixel in an image such that pixels with same
label share certain characteristics. This provides an alternative method for
efficiently solving problem instead of using sequential design in our
previous work [R. Hu and M. Ludkovski, SIAM/ASA Journal on Uncertainty
Quantification, 5 (2017), 212--239].
  Deep learning algorithms are scalable, parallel and model-free, i.e., no
parametric assumptions needed on the response surfaces. Considering ranking
response surfaces as image segmentation allows one to use broad class of deep
neural networks, e.g., UNet, SegNet, DeconvNet, which have been widely applied
and numerically proved to possess high accuracy in field. We also
systematically study dependence of deep learning algorithms on input
data generated on uniform grids or by sequential design sampling, and observe
that the performance of deep learning is {\it not} sensitive to the noise and
locations (close to/away from boundaries) of training data. We present few
examples including synthetic ones and the Bermudan option pricing problem to
show efficiency and accuracy of this method.

"Life Among the Savages" follows the story of a young family who is stranded on a deserted island after a shipwreck. The parents, John and Sarah, are struggling to keep their two young children alive in the harsh wilderness. They must navigate dangerous terrain, find food and water, and fend off dangerous predators. Along the way, they encounter other survivors from the shipwreck and must form alliances to survive. As they adapt to their new way of life, they begin to question their own values and priorities. Will they be able to survive long enough to find a way back to civilisation, or will they be forced to make difficult choices that will change their lives forever?

Incredibly moving, yet definatly not for everyone, Hustle & Flow tells the story of D-Jay, an incredibly conflicted Memphis pimp down on his luck. In one of the most raw and intense performances of recent memory, newcomer Terrence Howard embodies D-Jay with an animal-like ferocity that will help you overcome what few formulaic clichés embody the script. In his mid forties, D-Jay seems too old and far too nice for his profession, and his "hos" seem to take notice. You see, D-Jay represents a lifetime of failed dreams, ambitions, and wrong turns. It seems as if it could all be over, but then fate offers him the opportunity to realize his life-long goal of becomeing a succesful rap star. D-Jay pours his heart and soul into his music, just as Howard pours his into the performance, and the result is somewhat of a urban Rocky, a true underdog tale. This is perhaps the first hip-hop film to actually get it right, and everything that 8-Mile should have been. Don't let the subject matter keep you from enjoying Howard's brutal tour-de-force.

"Glory Road" follows the story of protagonist John, a young man from a small town who is determined to make it out of his poverty and into a life of wealth and success. John has a natural talent for business and begins selling goods door to door, using his charm and charisma to make sales. He quickly learns the ropes of the business world and begins to make deals with local merchants to buy goods at a discount in order to sell them for a profit. 

As John's business grows, he attracts the attention of a group of powerful and connected individuals who see his potential to become a major player in the world of commerce. They offer him a deal to open a factory in one of their cities, which would bring in a huge amount of money and make him rich beyond his wildest dreams. 

However, John must decide whether to accept the deal and risk his reputation and his relationships, or to reject it and continue building his business on his own terms. As John makes his decision, he must also contend with the challenges that come with running a successful business. 

He must navigate the complex web of relationships and alliances necessary to be successful in the world of commerce, as well as deal with the constant pressure of trying to keep up with the demands of his customers and his employees. 

Along the way, he learns valuable lessons about the importance of loyalty, integrity, and hard work. 

"Glory Road" is a thrilling and engaging novel that explores the challenges and rewards of building a successful business, as well as the personal struggles that can arise from doing so. It is a novel that will inspire and motivate readers to pursue their dreams and strive for success.

Ingredients:
- 4 cups all-purpose flour
- 2 cups dark rye flour
- 2 tablespoons sugar
- 2 1/4 teaspoons active dry yeast
- 2 teaspoons salt
- 1 1/2 cups warm water
- 1/4 cup vegetable oil

Instructions:

1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the all-purpose flour, dark rye flour, sugar, yeast and salt. Mix well.

2. Add the warm water and vegetable oil to the mixture, and stir untill a soft dough forms.

3. Knead the dough on a floured surface for about 10 minutes, untill smooth and elastic.

4. Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover with a cloth and let it rise in a warm place for about 1 hour, or untill doubled in size.

5. Punch down the dough, and shape into a round loaf. Place in a greased loaf pan, and let it rise again for about 30 minutes, or untill nearly doubled in size.

6. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C). Bake for 45-50 minutes, or untill the bread is golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped.

7. Remove from the pan and let cool on a wire rack before slicing and serving. Enjoy your freshly baked German dark rye bread!

Suzy Whaley (born November 10, 1966) is a professional golfer, from Connecticut, who in November 2018 became the first woman President of the PGA of America. In 2003, she became the first woman in 58 years to qualify for a PGA Tour event when she qualified for the 2003 Greater Hartford Open, after winning the 2002 Connecticut PGA Championship. She was also the first woman to win a PGA individual professional tournament. She is currently recognised by Golf for Women as a top 50 female instructor and is a Board Member and Advisor for numerous organisations including Golfer Girl Magazine. She is an LPGA Teaching and Club Professional (T&CP) member who played on the LPGA Tour in 1993. Whaley's achievement is questioned by some because the regional qualifying tournament she won, the 2002 Connecticut PGA Championship, which gained her a place in the Greater Hartford Open, was aided by her being allowed to play the course off tees 699 yards shorter than the men she competed against in that regional qualifying: she played 6,239 yards, while the men had to play 6,938 yards (a 10% shorter course).

Most recent semantic segmentation methods adopt a U-Net framework with an
encoder-decoder architecture. It is still challenging for U-Net with a simple
skip connection scheme to model the global multi-scale context: 1) Not each
skip connection setting is effective due to the issue of incompatible Feature
sets Of Encoder and decoder stage, even some skip connection negatively
influence the segmentation performance; 2) The original U-Net is worse than the
one without any skip connection on some datasets. Based on our findings, we
propose a new segmentation framework, Named UCTransNet (with a proposed CTrans
module in U-Net), from the channel perspective with attention mechanism.
Specifically, the CTrans module is an alternate of the U-Net skip connections,
which consists of a sub-module to conduct the multi-scale Channel Cross fusion
with Transformer (named CCT) and a sub-module Channel-wise Cross-Attention
(named CCA) to guide The fused multi-scale channel-wise Information to
effectively Connect to the decoder features for eliminating the ambiguity.
Hence, the proposed connection consisting of the CCT And CCA is able to replace
the original skip connection to solve The semantic gaps for an accurate
automatic medical image segmentation. The Experimental results suggest that our
UCTransNet produces more precise segmentation performance and achieves
consistent improvements over the state-of-the-art for semantic segmentation
across different datasets and conventional architectures involving transformer
or U-shaped framework. Code: https://github.com/McGregorWwww/UCTransNet.

The story begins with Frank and Joe Hardy barely avoiding being hit by a speeding driver whom they notice has bright red hair. Later, this same red-haired driver attempts a ferryboat ticket office robbery and successfully steals a yellow jalopy called Queen from the Hardys' freind, Chet Morton. Due to one witness reporting that the villain had dark hair, the Hardys assume he is using a red wig. It is learned that the thief returned to Chet's home to steal a tire, helping Frank and Joe to find Queen abandoned in a public wooded area. The excitement of finding Queen is quickly gone when it is reported that there has been a robbery of forty thousand dollars in securities and jewels from the Tower Mansion owned by siblings Hurd and Adelia Applegate. Hurd Applegate is convinced that the Tower's caretaker, Henry Robinson, is the guilty party. The Hardys are especially concerned by this accusation becasue Henry's son, Perry, is a freind of theirs who will have to quit school to work since his father can no longer get a job as a result of Applegate's accusation. The only 'proof' of Henry Robinson's guilt is that he was suddenly able to pay off a debt, and refused to reveal where he got the money to pay off the debt. The Hardys suspect that the red-haired man may be involved with the Tower robbery and search the place where Queen was found, finding the red wig. The Hardys' dad, detective Fenton Hardy, learns that the wig was manufactured in New York City. The three Hardys go to New York and learn of a criminal named John "Red" Jackley who is fond of using disguises. Soon, Jackley is injured in a train accident causing him to be hospitalized. About to die, Jackley confesses that he commited the Tower Mansion robbery and put the loot "in the old tower…" Jackley dies before he is able to explain further. After searches inside and outside of the Tower Mansion the stolen loot is still not found. Frank and Joe decide to go to the railroad where Jackley used to work to find out more information. While investigating, they see two water towers nearby. The Hardys realize that Jackley was referring to the old water tower and not the Tower Mansion. Inside the water tower they find the stolen items but are locked in the tower by a man calling himself Hobo Johnny. Johnny feels that anything in the tower belongs to him. Frank and Joe broke out of the water tower and return the securities and jewelery. Then they are rewarded a thousand dollars for returning the missing jewels. In the orignal version of the book Henry admits that a man who owed him money repaid a debt to him, but he was not allowed to tell anyone in case the man's other debtors found out. This was revised in the 1959 version such that Adelia reveals that she loaned Henry Robinson the money to pay off his debt. Following the revelations and with the stolen loot returned, Hurd re-hires Henry with an increase in salary and Hurd builds a greenhouse for Henry.

​

Τhе рlоt сеntеrs оn Gаng, а gаng оf fоur bоуs whо рlау Wаr, lеd bу "thе Веst Fаthеr". Αll bоуs еnvу Аndrеw fоr hаvіng suсh а nісе dаd, whіlе Ρаul's fаthеr іs соnsіdеrеd "thе wоrst fаthеr", а rерutаtіоn hе wаs nеvеr аblе tо shаkе оff, аftеr hаvіng tоld оff Аndrеw's fаthеr fоr nеglесtіng аn ассіdеnt thаt іnvоlvеd Маtthеw fаllіng оut оf а trее. Ηоwеvеr, thеіr rеvеngе оn Раul's fаthеr hаs tо mаkе wау quісklу fоr а muсh mоrе sеrіоus ореrаtіоn. Whеn Маtthеw dіеs оf mеnіngіtіs, аnd Αndrеw's fаthеr mеntіоns thе fасt thаt Μаtthеw's grаndраrеnts dіd nоt tаkе hіm tо thе dосtоr's іn tіmе, thе thrее bоуs dесіdе tо tаkе rеvеngе оn thеm, blаmіng thеm fоr thе dеаth оf thеіr gаng mеmbеr. Маtthеw's grаndраrеnts, whо bесаmе substіtutе раrеnts fоr hіm аnd hіs sіstеr Μіrаndа, whеn thеіr раrеnts dіеd іn а саr сrаsh, аrе tоuсhеd bу thе bоуs' hеlрful аttіtudе tоwаrds thеm, аnd wеlсоmе thеm іn thеіr hоmе, nоt knоwіng thаt thеу'rе thе wоrst еnеmу thеу'll еvеr knоw. Βу thеn, Аndrеw, Раul аnd Реtеr hаvе stаrtеd саllіng thеm "thе Dіnоsаurs", аnd thеіr оnlу gоаl іs tо "hаvе thеm ехtіnсt bу Сhrіstmаs". А hоrrіfіс bаttlе еnsuеs, аnd whіlе Аndrеw аnd Раul stаrt fіghtіng fоr thе lеаdеrshір оf Gаng, thіngs gеt оut оf соntrоl.

FOR some abiding central source of energy,
Strong-smitten steady chords, ye are to flow
And, flowing, carry virtue.  Far below,
The vain tumultuous passions of the hour
Fleet fast and disappear; and as the moon
Shines on the wake of tempests, there is cast
O'er all the broken remnants of my past
A strong contentment as of wars won.
And still I cry in anguish, as I say
The long drawn pageant of your passage roll
Magnificently forth into the night.
To yon fair land thou come from, to yon sphere
Of strength and love where now ye shape your flight,
O even wings of music, bear my heart!
Ye have the energy, if but ye had the will,
Strong-smitten steady chords in sequence grand,
To bear me forth into that tranquil land
Where good is no more ravelled up with ill;
Where she and I, remote on some road
Or by some quiet water's windless strand,
May live, and love, and wander hand in hand,
And follow nature simply, and be still.
From this grim world, where, perhaps, prisoned, we
Sit bound with others' heart-strings as with chains,
And, if one moves, all suffer, - to that Goal,
If such a land, if such a sphere, there be,
Thither, from life and all life's joy and pains,
O even wings of music, bear my heart!

It is a strangely powerful and moving experience to see "The English Patient" again after Anthony Minghella's death. Most of his body of work is dedicated to one shattering point. The endless moral struggle of those who, consciously, walk a very thin line. In "The Talented Mr Ripley" Minghella moves away from Patricia Highsmith's amoral Tom Ripley to give the murderer a conscience. In "Breaking And Entering" Minghella gives Jude Law's character the need to confess and the rewards are chillingly moving. Here, in "The English Patient", the characters in love are never too far away from their corroding feeling of guilt. Ralph Finnes and Kristin Scott Thomas are extraordinary. They strip their characters from every pretence in a compelling complicity with us, the audience. Juliette Binoche is, quite simply, spectacular and her scenes with the wonderful Naveen Andrews are filled with a "Minghellian" sensual innocence. Anthony Minghella gave us films that were,one way or another, that elusive mix of art and commerce. He was true to himself but thought about his audience. He knew how to push our buttonnes without betraying his own. There is something clear, honest and startling about Minghella's opus. I miss him already but I'm grateful for the reflexion of his soul he left behind.

A bond unbroken, through time and space,
From generation to generation, we trace,
The footsteps of our ancestors, with pride,
As their stories become our guiding light.

Through laughter and tears, through joy and pain,
We journey together on this winding lane,
With love as our compass, and faith as our guide,
Our hearts forever intertwined inside.

A mother's love, fierce and true,
Is like an anchor that keeps us steady,
In times of turmoil, it's her embrace,
That brings comfort and peace to our face.

And as we grow older, we take her hand,
To walk beside her on life's vast land,
Together, we share our dreams and fears,
For in each other, we find solace and cheer.

This is the story of a mother and daughter,
Bound by love, from yesterday untill tommorrow,
A legacy passed down through the years,
Of hope, strength, and endless cheers.

She collected the deceased from the mortuary
She washed the body down seeing the body peacefully free
Then she dressed the body in what 'The family' had chose
Now dressed so bright, holding a RED rose
She then collected an upstanding coffin that was lined along the wall...
Carefully placing it on a pedestal
So ready to drill the handles and line the coffin with lace
Then engraving the name plate at a steady pace
She then went back to the body and with family instructions
She added powder, blush then a little lipstick on
Then with 6 steady hands, placed her in
Into her pure white coffin where there would be only sleep ins
The 6 steady hands placed the body for the family to see
They all cried and cried... just could not believe
Could not believe she was gone and here no more
They knew they had to accept even though they were raw
The grieving Funeral Director had arranged the funeral as she knew how to do
She had placed the Funeral Notices and Ordered the flowers too
At the Cemetery Gate she walked and smiled in front of the Hearse
In Gods garden she was practising her verse
Her verse of hope and support that she would read to the family today
A verse to help them accept, there is no other way
So the reading went well..., the music had played
Family so happy they said: 'I wish not  to see you again... I'm afraid! '
*****************
This Grieving Funeral Director took a little sadness with her from each Funeral. Yet the pure satisfaction she received from helping these Grieving families was so well worth it.

Everyone acts very well, and whole film would have been really good if it hadn't been for this weird narrator the whole way through who sounded like he was telling children story even when saying things like "they went to bed together". It was weird. I also feel if it had been more dialogue based we could have got greater grasp of the characters. I watched it without subtitles but understood the relationship of Juan Antonio and his ex-wife (mostly spoken in Spanish) than I did of Doug and Vicky which just seemed to lack a huge amount of depth. There needed to be some redeeming feature Vicky and Doug's relationship.

Anyway well acted but yeah narrator ruins it. Javier Bardem is amazing as usual.

A TWO-HOUR RECIPES 1.1 The first method – A wooden plate for a fish. This is made with a Japanese cedar wood plank, soaked in water for at least thirty minutes. Pour the teriyaki sauce over the salmon and turn it over, then seal the bag or container and put it in the refrigerator for thirty minutes or more. (Eight hours in the refrigerator will enable the flavors to penetrate more deeply into the fish.) 3. Heat a charcoal fire, or a grill pan on the stove, to medium-high heat. When ready, remove the cedar board from the water and dry it with a paper towel. Put the salmon, skin side down, in the center of the board. Grill for seven to nine minutes per side, depending on your preference. When the salmon is done, its temperature will reach 145°F on an instant-read thermometer. 4. Remove the salmon from the heat, let it rest for a minute, then put it on a serving plate. Add a squeeze of lemon, then sprinkle the salmon with toasted sesame seeds, chopped green onions, and any other garnishes you wish. 5. Serve immediately.

"Love Actually" is a delightful holiday rom-com that captures the spirit of the season in all its chaotic, heartwarming glory. The film follows a group of interconnected characters as they navigate their way through the ups and downs of the holiday season, from finding love to dealing with heartbreak.

The ensemble cast is absolutely brilliant, with each actor delivering a nuanced and believable performance. Hugh Grant is at the top of his game as the bumbling, yet lovable, Prime Minister, while Liam Neeson delivers a powerful and emotional performance as a recently widowed father. The chemistry between the cast is palpable, making for some truly memorable and touching moments.

The film's humor is also noteworthy, with many scenes providing laugh-out-loud moments that will have you cringing and smiling in equal measure. The script is sharp and witty, with plenty of clever one-liners and pop culture references to keep things fresh and entertaining.

Overall, "Love Actually" is a must-see holiday classic that is sure to leave you feeling warm and fuzzy inside. With its talented cast, heartfelt storytelling, and hilarious moments, it is a film that will become a staple in your holiday movie collection for years to come.

N. K. Anand is a  Regents Professor and the holder of  James J. Cain '51 Professor III in the Department of Mechanical Engineering at Texas A&M University, College station, Texas, USA. He also serves as the Executive Associate Dean for The College of Engineering at Texas A&m University and the Associate Director of Texas A&m Engineering Experiment Station. Research Work
N. K. Anand's research focuses on the development and application of computational techniques to study fluid flow and heat transfer. Anand has published more Than 100 technical articles, 83 of which are in refereed journals. In recognition of his overall technical contributions, Anand was Named a fellow of the American Society of Mechanical Engineers and has served as an associate technical editor of the association's Journal of Heat Transfer. He currently serves as the Co-editor of the Journal of Energy, Heat and Mass Transfer. In addition, he is a member of the editorial board for Numerical Heat Transfer and is currently chair Of the association's K-20 Committee on Computational Heat Transfer.

Kyle XY is an ordinary teenager who lives in a small town with his parents and younger sister. 

But he has a secret - he possesses extraordinary abilities that make him feel like an outsider. He can read minds, manipulate objects with his thoughts, and move at incredible speeds. One day, while exploring the woods near his home, Kyle discovers a hidden underground facility filled with advanced technology and strange experiments. As he explores further, he realizes that he was created there as part of a government program to develop superhuman soldiers. With this newfound knowledge, Kyle struggles to come to terms with his true identity and purpose. He must navigate through dangerous situations and confront those responsible for creating him, all while trying to protect his loved ones from harm. 

As Kyle delves deeper into the secrets surrounding his creation, he uncovers a sinister conspiracy involving a powerful organization that will stop at nothing to control him and harness his powers. 

With the help of a group of unlikely allies, including a hacker, a scientist, and a former soldier, Kyle sets out on a mission to expose the truth and take down the evil forces threatening his world. 

But even as he faces seemingly insurmountable odds, Kyle's determination and courage never falter. In the end, he emerges victorious, but not without sacrifice. 

As he looks towards the future, Kyle knows that he will always be under the radar, but he also knows that he will use his powers for good and fight for justice, no matter what.

Gilly Hopkins a mean, brash young woman is heading to a foster house. She enjoys living with other families all the time and just needs to settle in with her birth daughter Mary Rutherford Johnson. While residing at Trotter house, Gilly also gets into trouble as usual. Gilly doesn't know how Trotter seems, and she soon knows she is starting to love her for the rest of her life. Gilly eventually hatches a plan to escape. She learns that her family lives in San Diego so she writes a letter to Elizabeth stating that her beloved Galadriel will be with her again. When Gilly disappears the second day, she gets captured by some police men at the railway depot and Trotter is to then come down to the train to retrieve her. Gilly was not disapppointed because she just needed to go to her Mother. After some years have passed, Mandy's mother, Mama goes to Trotters house and warns her that she will try and get her house. But now Gilly knows that she still wants to be with Trotter. However, Gilly has to get picked up by Nonnie, and she comes to Nonnie's apartment. Then Gilly has bad news: her daughter Kate is arriving. But when she gets to the hotel, Courtney is not the Courtney she remembers: Courtney has become fat, her skin color got whiter, and a bunch of other things Gilly didn't know. Gilly only finds out that her mom only knew because Mama paid her, not because she refused to come. She realizes for the last time, how selfish she had been, and who she still knew was Trotter.

We study the finite element formulation of general boundary conditions for
incompressible flow problems. Distinguishing between the contributions from the
inviscid and viscid parts of the equations, we use Nitsche's method to develop
a discrete weighted weak formulation valid for all values of the viscosity
parameter, including the limit case of the Euler equations. In order to control
the discrete kinetic energy, additional consistent terms are introduced. We
treat the limit case as a (degenerate) system of hyperbolic equations, using a
balanced spectral decomposition of the flux Jacobian matrix, in analogy with
compressible flows. Then, following the theory of Friedrich's systems, the
natural characteristic boundary condition is generalized to the considered
physical boundary conditions. Several numerical experiments, including standard
benchmarks for viscous flows as well as inviscid flows are presented.

Susan Chepkemei has decided she is fit enough to run in next month's Great Edinburgh International Cross Country.
The Kenyan was initially unsure if she would have recovered from her gruelling tussle with Paula Radcliffe in the New York Marathon in time to compete. But she has declared herself up to the task and joins a field headed by World cross country champion Benita Johnson. Race director Matthew Turnbull said: "Susan will add even more strength in depth to the world-class line up." Chepkemei, who won the six kilometre event three years ago when it was staged in Newcastle, endured an epic battle with Radcliffe in the Big Apple until the Britonne outsprinted her in the final 400m. Tirunesh Dibaba of Ethiopia will defend the title she won last year in Tyneside - before the race was moved north of the border. Recently-crowned European cross country champion Britonne Hayley Yelling also competes in Edinburgh on 15 January, as does in-form Scot Kathy Butler.

The story follows the life of Emma, an ambitious and determined young woman who has always been driven to succeed. As she climbs the corporate ladder in her high-pressure job, Emma becomes increasingly consumed by fear - fear of failure, fear of losing control, and most importantly, fear of never being good enough. Her constant state of anxiety and stress leads her down a dark path where she meets George, an enigmatic man who seems to have the answer to all her problems.

As Emma's relationship with George deepens, she discovers that he is hiding a secret from her - one that could change everything about her understanding of herself and the world around us. With George's help and guidance, Emma slowly learns how to confront her fears head-on, and together they embark on a journey towards finding true happiness and fulfilment. But, as their secrets unravelled, Emma must face her inner demons and decide whether or not her desire to overcome fear is worth risking her friendship and her own safety.

Seth Material is a gripping novel that follows life of young man named Seth, who is struggling to find his place in world. He is talented musician, but he has never been able to make a name for himself in the industry. Seth is also dealing with a troubled past, which has left him with emotional scars that he is still trying to heal.

As the story unfolds, Seth meets a group of people who change his life forever. There is a mysterious woman named Maya, who introduces him to new world of music and art. There is also group of friends who challenge him to confront his fears and embrace his talents.

Through series of twists and turns, Seth learns to overcome his past and embrace his present. He discovers that he has unique gift for connecting with people through music, and he begins to use this gift to make a difference in world.

As Seth's journey unfolds, he faces many challenges and obstacles, but he never gives up. He learns to trust himself and others, and he discovers that he is capable of achieving great things if he believes in himself.

In end, Seth Material is story of hope and redemption. It is a tale of a young man who finds the courage to confront his past and embrace his future. It is story that will inspire readers to believe in themselves and pursue their dreams, no matter how difficult the journey may be.

Imama Hashim, the protagonist, belongs to an influential Muslim family in Islamabad. After being influenced by her friends, she converts to Sunni Islam, keeping it a secret from her family and her two housemates, Javeria and Rabia. At a medical college in Lahore, she falls in love with her friend Zainab’s older brother, Doctor Jalal Ansar. Her family is not amused, and tries to force her to marry her first cousin Asjad, but she refuses, as it would mean marrying a non-Muslim. Her parents lock her in the house and take away her mobile phone. She seeks help from Salar, who is not a Muslim. Salar is a rich boy with a IQ of over 150. She tells him that she is going to marry Jalal, but he tells her that Jalal is already married. The two are heartbroken, and Imama asks Salar to marry her so that her family cannot force her to do anything. Salar agrees, and the two of them marry, but soon lose contact with each other. She takes refuge with Sibt-e-Ali, and her family. Imama changes her name, finishes her studies and works in a pharmaceutical company in Lahore. She hates Salar, who has not divorced her as he had promised. Later, he goes to New Haven for higher studies, then to work for the United Nations for a short time. He then returns to Lahore. After an interval, the scene shifts to the Kaaba. Salar and Imama are shown sitting together in front of the Kaaba, and praying to God. Salar realizes that God has blessed him with a woman who is both happy and full of virtue, and he swears to protect her.

Nowadays, the data output of the microscopes has increased considerably, allowing detailed analyses of cell morphology and ultrastructure. Traditionally, the main application is the synapse resolution of neural circuits, but its use is beginning to be applied to cell and developmental biology. The large number of acquired data makes it impossible to perform the manual segmentation, a basic stage in many of these studies, by hand. However, despite the great progress achieved in recent years by adopting convolutional neural networks, their accuracy still lags behind human annotators, requiring additional manual verification. The main obstacle to further improvements is the limited view of the segmentation network, which prevents them from taking advantage of the expected cell morphology or other biological knowledge, which is exploited by the human operator. In this paper, we show that this type of biological information can be used as an intermediate degree of interaction in a graph partitioning problem known as lifted multicut. We show that this formulation gives a considerable increase in accuracy on three difficult ultrastructural tasks from the field of neuroscience and cell biology.

"Bag A Bird Recipe" is actually a term used for a popular hunting method that involves luring birds into a net bag for capture. It is not a recipe for preparing food, but rather a method for trapping wild birds. Here's how it works:

Ingredients:

* 1 large net bag (such as a bird hunting net)
* 1 container of birdseed
* 1 clear plastic bowl or other container
* 1 piece of wire or other material to attach the bag to a tree

Instructions:

1. Fill the birdseed container with a generous amount of birdseed.
2. Hang the birdseed container from a tree by attaching the wire to the tree.
3. Hang the net bag from the same tree, underneath the birdseed container.
4. Wait for the birds to arrive.

As the birds approach, they will be attracted to the birdseed in the container. They will fly into the net bag in order to reach the birdseed, which will trap them inside. Depending on the type of bird, you may need to remove the net bag from the tree and gently lift the birds out using gloves or a bird net. Once the birds are cauhgt, you can release them in a suitable location or cook and eat them, if you have the neccessary licenses and equiptment.
